llm_values.evidence: At steps 2 through 6, the agent only selects slides 2, 3, 4, 5, and 6 to be included in the summary, despite the presentation containing relevant content slides up to slide 12 (as seen in the Slide Sorter view at step 21). Although the 'Summary Slide' feature in this environment appears to have included titles from subsequent slides regardless of selection, the agent's intentional plan was to only summarize a subset of the presentation, which violates the task of summarizing the 'contents'. Furthermore, the final summary slide (slide 13, seen in step 22) contains an empty title placeholder ('Click to add Title'), which the agent acknowledges but fails to fill, leaving the task incomplete.
llm_values.correction: The agent should have selected all relevant content slides (slides 2 through 12) before invoking the 'Summary Slide' feature, instead of only selecting slides 2 through 6. Additionally, the agent should have provided a title for the newly created summary slide (e.g., 'Summary' or 'Presentation Overview') instead of leaving the default 'Click to add Title' placeholder.
